title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 245.125 - Property owners notified of commissioners' report by publication — form of notice — mailing required
text:
245.125.  Property owners notified of commissioners' report by publication — form of notice — mailing required. — Upon the filing of the report of the commissioners, the clerk of said circuit court shall give notice thereof by causing publication to be made once in some newspaper published in each county in the district.  It shall not be necessary for said clerk to name the parties interested, but it shall be sufficient to say:
(RSMo 1939 § 12508, A.L. 1994 S.B. 633) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10918; 1919 § 4612 
Effective 7-12-94
